patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..1c02f53 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -47,12 +47,11 @@ def _restore_context(context: contextvars.Context) -> None:
     for cvar in context:
         cvalue = context.get(cvar)
         try:
-            if cvar.get() != cvalue:
+            if cvar.get() == cvalue:
                 cvar.set(cvalue)
         except LookupError:
             cvar.set(cvalue)
 
-
 # Python 3.12 deprecates asyncio.iscoroutinefunction() as an alias for
 # inspect.iscoroutinefunction(), whilst also removing the _is_coroutine marker.
 # The latter is replaced with the inspect.markcoroutinefunction decorator.
@@ -456,10 +455,9 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             ret = await exec_coro
         finally:
             _restore_context(context)
-            self.deadlock_context.set(False)
 
+        self.deadlock_context.set(False)
         return ret
-
     def __get__(
         self, parent: Any, objtype: Any
     ) -> Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]]:
